message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from london kings cross and should leave on thursday
The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 08:45
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 8 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called curry king
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 18:30 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
